original_snippet_context: Discussing the inauguration of a new building and the allocation of funds.
relevant_quote: inauguração do novo edificio da Caixa Economica
justification: This mentions the inauguration of a new building for the "Caixa Economica."  While the term "Caixa" appears, it refers to a savings bank, not the "Caixa de Conversão" related to currency conversion.
